meta.source_name: Curated major global petroleum storage terminals
meta.notes: Named major petroleum storage hubs with approximate hub-centroid coordinates from public operator and port authority pages. Global coverage across trading basins — not an audited tank-capacity registry; verify active operations before commercial use.

entities.name: Fujairah Oil Industry Zone (FOIZ)
entities.commodity: crude oil, refined products, fuel oil
entities.capacity_text: ~10+ million m³ combined tankage (public FOIZ hub estimate)

entities.name: ADNOC Fujairah Storage
entities.capacity_text: FOIZ onshore + underground storage hub (public ADNOC/FOIZ pages; not per-tank audited)
entities.notes: Hub centroid in Fujairah Oil Industry Zone (FOIZ), east of Fujairah International Airport — not the airport runway. Offshore SPM berths are separate.

entities.name: ADNOC Sas Al Nakhl / Umm Al Nar Storage Hub
entities.capacity_text: Multi-tank crude & products hub (public ADNOC industrial area; exact bbl not audited)
entities.notes: Approximate hub centroid near Sas Al Nakhl / Umm Al Nar industrial area. OSM maps the ADNOC industrial polygon (way/217437068) separately from anonymous storage_tank nodes — verify exact tank counts and active operations before commercial use.

entities.name: Ju'aymah Crude Oil Terminal
entities.notes: Adjacent to Ras Tanura tank farms; separate Aramco export terminal — curated gap-fill when OSM clusters stop at refinery fence.

entities.name: Cushing Crude Oil Storage Hub
entities.capacity_text: ~90 million bbl working capacity (EIA Cushing hub reference)

entities.name: Jamnagar Refinery Tank Farm
entities.notes: World-scale refinery tank farm; Sikka terminal ~8 km east — retain curated hub when OSM maps only part of the complex.

entities.name: St. Eustatius Terminal
entities.commodity: crude oil, refined products, fuel oil

entities.name: EAPC Ashkelon Oil Terminal
entities.capacity_text: ~1.9 million m³ crude storage (public EAPC hub estimate; not per-tank audited)
entities.notes: Northern Ashkelon tank farm (EAPC / Europe Asia Pipeline Company). OSM tank polygons are sparse or absent for this hub; curated gap-fill separate from southern Paz tank farm mapped in OSM (~3 km south).

entities.name: Primorsk Oil Terminal
entities.capacity_text: Major Baltic export hub (public Transneft reference)

entities.name: Rio de Janeiro Duque de Caxias Storage
